args: for d in "${PHASE2_CNNVD_SKILL_ROOT:-}" /opt/opencode-skills/skills/phase2-cnnvd-report /Users/yao/.claude/skills/phase2-cnnvd-report; do if [ -n "$d" ] && [ -x "$d/scripts/chrome-devtools-mcp-wrapper.sh" ]; then exec "$d/scripts/chrome-devtools-mcp-wrapper.sh"; fi; done; echo 'phase2-cnnvd-report chrome-devtools-mcp-wrapper.sh not found' >&2; exit 1
